title: Biliary colic follow-up

investigations.text: Supports documenting symptoms, liver-test and ultrasound status, and existing investigation context without interpreting results.
investigations.rationale: The exact gallstone diagnostic-context section supports interval biliary symptoms and clinician review of existing liver tests and ultrasound without diagnosing a new episode.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting symptoms, liver-test and ultrasound status, and existing investigation context without interpreting results.

source.title: Gallstone disease: diagnosis and management — Recommendations

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording clinician-entered discussion and post-treatment symptom follow-up without creating advice.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact follow-up information section supports documenting clinician discussion and arranged follow-up without generating surgery or dietary advice.

source_limitations: Current diagnosis, pain phenotype, jaundice, fever, test interpretation, complication, medicine, surgery, referral, urgency, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
